description: Access Zen Browser spaces, tabs, and custom tab labels

functions.name: getDebugInfo
functions.description: Return diagnostic info for Zen experiment API debugging

parameters.name: anchorTabId
parameters.description: Active extension tab ID used to locate the Zen browser window

functions.name: getCustomLabels
functions.description: Returns custom tab labels for the given tab IDs

parameters.name: anchorTabId
parameters.description: Active extension tab ID used to locate the Zen browser window

functions.name: getAllTabs
functions.description: Returns tabs across all Zen spaces

parameters.name: anchorTabId
parameters.description: Active extension tab ID used to locate the Zen browser window

functions.name: switchSpace
functions.description: Switch to a Zen space by UUID

parameters.name: anchorTabId
parameters.description: Active extension tab ID used to locate the Zen browser window

functions.name: activateTab
functions.description: Activate a tab by extension ID, switching spaces if needed

parameters.name: anchorTabId
parameters.description: Active extension tab ID used to locate the Zen browser window

functions.name: activateTabByDomId
functions.description: Activate a tab by DOM id, switching spaces if needed

parameters.name: anchorTabId
parameters.description: Active extension tab ID used to locate the Zen browser window
